title: On a Feature, can you preset column values for a customer's column?
excerpt:
Hi, 
Predefine column values for a customer into a column. So when they click a button, values from that column are used to generate an action. 
I.e. status column with “run test 1” “run test2” 
Any way to add this to cu…

posts.author: ianhunter373 (IH)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Predefine column values for a customer into a column. So when they click a button, values from that column are used to generate an action.

I.e. status column with “run test 1” “run test2”

Any way to add this to custom features?

posts.author: joseph.monday (Joseph Laux)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Ian,

Welcome to the community!

To clarify you request, what do you mean by clicking a button that the values will be used to generate an action? If possible, could you diagram/show an example of what this would look like? Thank you!

Best,
Joseph
